name: UNINOVA – Instituto de Desenvolvimento de Novas Tecnologias
description: UNINOVA is a research institute associated with NOVA University Lisbon, focused on new technologies and innovation. The institute conducts research in intelligent systems, robotics, and digital technologies for industrial and societal applications.

name: TFC Research and Innovation Limited
description: TFC is a research and innovation consultancy specialising in EU-funded project coordination, stakeholder engagement, and dissemination strategies. TFC supports projects across climate action, digital inclusion, and social innovation.

name: Smart Venice Srl
description: Smart Venice is a research and consultancy organisation focused on sustainable urban development and smart city solutions. The organisation develops innovative approaches to environmental monitoring and citizen engagement in transition processes.

name: Székely Family & Co. Nonprofit Ltd.
description: SFC is a non-profit organisation dedicated to community development and social innovation in Central and Eastern Europe. The organisation focuses on participatory approaches to regional transition challenges and capacity building for vulnerable communities.

name: Fondazione Giacomo Brodolini Srl SB
description: FGB is a research foundation specialising in labour market studies, social policy analysis, and inclusive economic development. The foundation provides evidence-based research to support fair transition policies and social cohesion across Europe.

name: AITEC Asesores Internacionales SRL
description: AITEC is an international consultancy firm providing expertise in project management, policy analysis, and capacity building for European projects. AITEC specialises in supporting regional development and transition strategies.

name: Women Engage for a Common Future e.V.
description: WECF is an international network of environmental and women's organisations working towards gender-just and sustainable transitions. WECF advocates for inclusive climate and environmental policies that address social equity and gender perspectives.

name: Universidad Complutense de Madrid
description: UCM is one of the oldest universities in Europe and a leading Spanish research institution. The university conducts interdisciplinary research in social sciences, environmental studies, and policy analysis with focus on sustainable development.

name: Fundació Eurecat
description: EURECAT is a leading applied research and technology centre in Catalonia. The organisation conducts research in digital technologies, industrial systems, and sustainability, with emphasis on technology transfer and innovation for societal challenges.

name: Technological University Dublin
description: TU Dublin is Ireland's first technological university, established in 2019. The university conducts research across sustainability, digital transformation, and social innovation, with a focus on evidence-based policy development for inclusive transitions.
